name: SAP HANA MCP Server
what_it_does: SAP HANA MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with SAP HANA in-memory database — executing SQL queries with HANA-specific functions, accessing column store analytics, querying HANA system views and metadata, and integrating SAP's enterprise in-memory analytics platform into agent-driven business intelligence and ERP data analysis workflows.
use_cases: Executing analytical SQL against SAP HANA from BI and reporting agents
Querying SAP ERP data via HANA from enterprise analytics agents
Accessing HANA-specific calculation views from finance analytics agents
Exploring HANA schemas and system views from DBA assistant agents
Integrating HANA data into LLM-powered business reporting workflows
Analyzing real-time operational data from SAP applications via HANA
not_for: Teams without SAP HANA license (enterprise product with significant costs)
Non-SAP environments (HANA is tightly integrated with SAP ecosystem)
Teams using other analytics databases (Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery)
best_when: An enterprise team in an SAP environment needs AI-assisted analytics on HANA data — particularly for organizations running SAP S/4HANA, SAP BW/4HANA, or SAP Analytics Cloud.
avoid_when: You're not in an SAP ecosystem or don't have HANA infrastructure.

auth.notes: SAP HANA connection credentials (host, port, user, password). hdbcli Python driver required. HANA Cloud supports SAML/SSO. Store credentials in environment variables.

pricing.free_tier_limits: SAP HANA Cloud Trial: free 30-day trial; SAP BTP Free Tier available
pricing.paid_tiers: SAP HANA Cloud: significant enterprise licensing costs
pricing.notes: SAP HANA Cloud trial available free. Enterprise licensing is substantial. SAP-samples MCP from official SAP repository — higher quality baseline.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise HANA — no MCP rate limits; server and license capacity bound

known_agent_gotchas: hdbcli Python driver must be installed — separate SAP pip package, not on PyPI
HANA SQL has unique features (calculation views, series data) — agents need HANA-specific prompting
Column store analytics queries differ from row store — understand HANA data model
HANA system views (_SYS_*) give powerful metadata access — useful for schema exploration
Official SAP-samples MCP — reflects SAP investment in AI integration
HANA Cloud vs on-premise versions have capability differences
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise HANA credentials. TLS encrypted connections. SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA compliance. Official SAP-samples MCP. Use read-only HANA user for analytics. Store credentials in env var.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise credentials. TLS. SOC2/GDPR/HIPAA. Official SAP MCP. Read-only user recommended. Env var for creds.
